function.name: pc_activate
function.description: Directly invoke/click a UI element on the PC by its name, using the OS accessibility API (AT-SPI2 on Linux, UI Automation on Windows). No mouse simulation — the action is triggered through the accessibility framework, so it works even if the window is not in focus. Use pc_ui_elements first to find the exact element name, then call this tool with that name.

name.description: The element's name/label as returned by pc_ui_elements.

window_title.description: The window_title as returned by pc_ui_elements. Leave empty to match any window.
